description_long: This arcade game cabinet stands on a sturdy, square metal base with a weathered yellow finish, supporting a tall black pedestal adorned with blue geometric graphics. The upper section houses a large, flat display screen set within a beige, boxy enclosure that shows signs of wear and grime, suggesting heavy use in a public urban environment. Below the screen is a control panel with a few visible buttons and a slot, likely for coins or tokens, and a small label area. The rear of the cabinet features ventilation grilles, dual cooling fans, and multiple ports, indicating internal electronic components. The side panels are plain except for the blue geometric decals, and the overall structure is robust, designed to withstand frequent interaction. The cabinet's utilitarian design and visible wear make it suitable for placement in arcades, subway stations, or other high-traffic urban locations.
description: A weathered arcade game cabinet with a beige upper section, large flat screen, and blue geometric graphics on a black pedestal, standing on a yellow metal base. The cabinet features a control panel, coin slot, and visible rear ventilation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large flat screen, control panel with buttons, and coin slot, all set in a beige enclosure atop a black pedestal with blue graphics.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the boxy beige enclosure with ventilation grilles and the blue geometric decal on the black pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dual cooling fans, multiple ports, and a large ventilation grille, with the yellow base and black pedestal visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain beige enclosure, ventilation grilles, and blue geometric decal on the pedestal.
attribute_screen_type: Flat CRT or LCD display, large with a thick bezel, matte finish, rectangular shape.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a few buttons and a coin slot, arranged in a compact row below the screen; color scheme is mostly gray and black.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Blue geometric decals on a black background; no additional artwork or imagery.
